member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Entities.Certificate
member.summary: Represents an X.509 certificate with PQC algorithms.
Reconstitutes a Certificate entity from persistence.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.DefaultCertificateAlgorithms
member.summary: Default certificate algorithm configuration for the National Digital ID system.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.DefaultCertificateAlgorithms.Signature
member.summary: Default signature algorithm for certificates: KAZ-SIGN-256 (Security Level 5).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.DefaultCertificateAlgorithms.SecurityLevel
member.summary: Security level for all certificate operations.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.CertificateStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a certificate.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm
member.summary: Represents the algorithm used for the certificate.

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm.MlDsa65
member.summary: ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204) - Post-Quantum Digital Signature. Security Level 3 (AES-192 equivalent).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm.MlDsa87
member.summary: ML-DSA-87 (FIPS 204) - Post-Quantum Digital Signature (higher security). Security Level 5 (AES-256 equivalent).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm.KazSign128
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-128 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm. Security Level 1 (comparable to ML-DSA-44).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm.KazSign192
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-192 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm. Security Level 3 (comparable to ML-DSA-65).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm.KazSign256
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-256 - Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm. Security Level 5 (comparable to ML-DSA-87).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm.EcdsaP256
member.summary: ECDSA with P-256 curve (classical, for backward compatibility).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.SignatureAlgorithm.EcdsaP384
member.summary: ECDSA with P-384 curve (classical, for backward compatibility).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Domain.Enums.RevocationReason
member.summary: Represents the reason for certificate revocation.
